constraints.title: Atomic file I/O with backup and recovery
constraints.description: All document saves MUST use atomic write pattern (write to temp + rename) with automatic backup before save. SwiftData store integrity MUST be verified on launch. Corrupted saves MUST trigger recovery UI with backup restoration.
constraints.rationale: BLOCKER-001 (SA-2 FATAL): Without atomic writes and backups, any crash during save permanently destroys user data. This is non-negotiable for a document-based app.

constraints.title: Viewport culling for 60fps at 10k nodes
constraints.description: Canvas rendering MUST implement viewport culling — only visible nodes and connections are drawn. Spatial index (R-tree) for O(log n) visibility queries. Target: 60fps with 10,000 nodes on Apple Silicon.
constraints.rationale: BLOCKER-002 (SC-1 FATAL): Without viewport culling, the app becomes completely unusable at 5000+ nodes. This is a hard performance requirement for any mind map app.

constraints.title: App Sandbox and Data Protection
constraints.description: App MUST be sandboxed with com.apple.security.files.user-selected.read-write. SwiftData store MUST use NSFileProtectionComplete. File permissions MUST be 700. Document-based app using NSDocument requires Security-Scoped Bookmarks for file access.
constraints.rationale: BLOCKER-004 (SE-1 HIGH): Without sandboxing and encryption, any malware running as the user can read all mind map content. This is required for Mac App Store and basic security.

constraints.title: Main actor isolation for all SwiftData operations
constraints.description: ALL SwiftData ModelContext operations MUST run on @MainActor. Auto-save timers, document changes, and user edits MUST be serialized through the main actor. No concurrent SwiftData writes.
constraints.rationale: BLOCKER-005 (SC-3 HIGH): Without actor isolation, concurrent SwiftData operations cause CrossActorViolation crashes and data corruption.

constraints.title: Automatic dark mode following macOS
constraints.description: App SHOULD observe NSApp.appearanceDidChangeNotification and automatically switch themes to match macOS appearance. Transition SHOULD be animated over 300ms.
constraints.rationale: BLOCKER-009 (UX-2 MEDIUM): Static dark mode that doesn't follow macOS creates poor user experience in evening hours.

constraints.title: Complete keyboard shortcut coverage
constraints.description: All user actions SHOULD have keyboard shortcuts. Missing: Cmd+1 (zoom 100%), Cmd+Shift+C/E (collapse/expand all), Cmd+Shift+0 (reset view), Cmd+A (select all), Cmd+C/X/V (copy/cut/paste). Shortcuts window accessible via Cmd+?.
constraints.rationale: BLOCKER-008 (UX-1 MEDIUM): Power users with large mind maps cannot work efficiently without full keyboard coverage.

constraints.title: Input sanitization and length limits
constraints.description: Node text input MUST be limited to 10,000 characters. HTML/script content MUST be sanitized before export. Export formats MUST escape all user content.
constraints.rationale: BLOCKER-007 (SE-3 MEDIUM): Without input limits and sanitization, exports could contain injection payloads and extremely long text could cause memory issues.

constraints.title: Rapid action debouncing
constraints.description: Cmd+N SHOULD be debounced to max 1 action per 500ms. Rapid repeated actions SHOULD coalesce. Confirmation dialog if creating more than 3 documents in 5 seconds.
constraints.rationale: BLOCKER-011 (SC-2 MEDIUM): Without debouncing, accidental key mashing creates dozens of documents and UI freezes.
